summary: Auto-Tune Optimizer feature fully tested. All 10 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified: grid range inputs, objective selector, run button, progress bar, best result panel, heatmap with 6 pair combinations, ranked table with all 10 columns (#, Z, DR, OFI, SL, Trd, WR, Sharpe, PnL, DD), and Apply Parameters button working correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ POST /api/replay/optimize with grid_config returns optimization_id and status=running
✅ GET /api/replay/optimize/status returns progress (current/total/pct/best_objective)
✅ GET /api/replay/optimize/result returns complete results with best, results, heatmap
✅ POST /api/replay/optimize/cancel cancels active optimization
✅ GET /api/replay/optimize/history lists previous optimizations
✅ Result includes all 6 heatmap pairs: zscore_x_delta_ratio, zscore_x_ofi, zscore_x_sl_atr, delta_ratio_x_ofi, delta_ratio_x_sl_atr, ofi_x_sl_atr
✅ Results are ranked by chosen objective function
✅ Grid with >1000 combinations rejected with 400 error
✅ Objective min_drawdown sorts ascending (smallest first)
✅ POST /api/replay/optimize with objective=sortino ranks by sortino_ratio
✅ Frontend Auto-Tune tab shows grid ranges (Z-Score, Delta Ratio, OFI, SL ATR)
✅ Frontend objective selector with 6 options (Sharpe, Sortino, Profit Factor, Net PnL, Min Drawdown, Expectancy)
✅ Frontend run button shows combination count (e.g., 'Auto-Tune (16)')
✅ Frontend progress bar visible during optimization
✅ Frontend cancel button visible during optimization
✅ Frontend best result panel shows Z-Score, Delta Ratio, OFI, SL ATR, Sharpe, PnL, Win Rate, Trades
✅ Frontend heatmap renders SVG with colored cells and axis labels
✅ Frontend heatmap pair selector with 6 combinations
✅ Frontend ranked table shows columns: #, Z, DR, OFI, SL, Trd, WR, Sharpe, PnL, DD
✅ Frontend 'Aplicar Parametros' button copies best result to config panel
critical_code_review_comments: Optimizer implementation is well-structured with proper async background execution
Heatmap data structure includes all 6 parameter pair combinations
Results correctly sorted by objective function (ascending for min_drawdown, descending for others)
Frontend correctly polls /optimize/status and fetches /optimize/result on completion
Apply Parameters button correctly merges best combo into config state

test_credentials.note: Used for API and frontend tests

seed_data_creation: None - tests use live v3_snapshots collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auto-Tune Optimizer fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/replay/optimize (start), GET /optimize/status (poll), GET /optimize/result (fetch), POST /optimize/cancel, GET /optimize/history. Grid config has 4 params (zscore_min, delta_ratio_min, ofi_threshold, sl_atr_mult) with min/max/steps. Objectives: sharpe, sortino, profit_factor, net_pnl, min_drawdown, expectancy. Heatmap has 6 pairs. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_optimizer.py. Use small grids (steps=2) for fast tests.

feature_verification.GET /api/replay/optimize/result: Working - returns best, results (ranked), heatmap (6 pairs)
feature_verification.Frontend Auto-Tune panel: Working - grid inputs, objective selector, run button
feature_verification.Frontend progress/cancel: Working - progress bar and cancel button during optimization
feature_verification.Frontend results: Working - best panel, heatmap with selector, ranked table
feature_verification.Frontend Apply Parameters: Working - copies best combo to config panel

mocked_api_note: POST /api/signalstack/order is MOCKED (SignalStack webhook). All optimizer tests use live endpoints and MongoDB.
